Class epp.DVenvArrayShallow 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----epp.DVenv

           +----epp.DVenvArrayShallow
public class DVenvArrayShallow
extends DVenv
The DVenvArrayShallow class is an implementation of DVenv using shallow binding.
